title: Melody's Cute Girl Traders
description: ♪ Cute Wandering Traders, meant to be used with Melody's Cute Girl Villagers. ~
body:
# ‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿ ♡ ‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿

# ‿︵‿୨ Introduction ୧‿︵‿

♪ Cute Wandering Traders, meant to be used with Melody's Cute Girl Villagers. ~

Please open a ticket on [discord](https://discord.gg/7H4hxybCgM) if you have any issues or inquiries regarding the pack.

![melody's cute girl wandering trader (right) and villagers (left)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/731a03c13db1b910ded8eb782ddc1391073bfb78.png)


# ‿︵‿୨ Additional Packs ୧‿︵‿

**Reconmended to use with these packs!**


[![Download](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf035b9520b97e74f117eb14e4a3d5da4b6387f7.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cutegirlvillagers)[![Download](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3c2088f96125b3be6527e6ace9b4ddc136a88b8.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/melodysillagers) [![Download](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd9726b4d9f6ce0c1c42ddfe4353477f151e8c52.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/melodyswitches)


#  IMPORTANT!
**You need either:**
- OptiFine 1.19.2 HD U I1 or higher for this resource pack to work. It **WILL NOT WORK** on optifine versions 1.21.3 or higher!\
 **OR**
- [EMF] Entity Model Features mod and ETF. (ESF and entity culling are reconmmended too). 

If the wandering trader looks broken... then there is likely another conflicting texture pack (two trader textures are overlapping each other from different packs)! To fix this just delete all wandering trader files and folders from the other pack. For example: if you are using "Mizuno's 16 Craft Resource Pack", just search and delete all the wandering trader files and it should work.


# ‿︵‿୨ Recommended ୧‿︵‿

- I prefer to use this pack with "Mizuno's 16 Craft Resource Pack" ~~(but inside mizunos folder delete all the villager and witch files and any files that this pack overwrites).~~

- The preferred shaders are "Sildrus Shaders" in the overworld and "Complementary Shaders Reimagined" in the end/nether world.
  
- If you want to replace the current pack icon just overwrite one of the pack icons to `pack.png`.


# ‿︵‿୨ Supported mods ୧‿︵‿

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Updated: 24/04/2026

• 01. Wandering Winemaker (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-vinery)

</details>


# ‿︵‿୨ Credits ୧‿︵‿

--- Credit to **_jx** & Cute Mob Models Resource pack for the original models ---

- I have heavily worked on, optimized, separated, and redid, all the textures/files/models/scripts since 2022, sketching ideas and physically working on this project to bring more variety of villagers and enhance them.
- Voice files added by me for all mobs.
- The original base model creator for the pack is said to have abandoned this pack and the Java porters struck out the "do not distribute" text as shown below and stated editing is allowed with credit given which I have done.


[Original Models](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cute-mob-models-resource-pack)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
![License to use models](https://i.imgur.com/wFpF9Zk.png)
Picture taken at (14/04/2024)
</details>
